reason: Vector search section: findNearest MUST carry .where('repoId','==',repoId) (no cross-repo leakage). Q1 ruling — discordMessages uses db.collectionGroup('discordMessages').where('repoId','==',repoId).findNearest({vectorField:'embedding'}) to hit the existing COLLECTION_GROUP index; commits keep collection(...).where('repoId').findNearest({vectorField:'messageEmbedding'}) COLLECTION-scope. No index added/changed (user's job, §R2). Rule F: onDiscordMessageCreated writes the field name `embedding` that searchDiscordMessages + the index prefilter on.

Best-effort: searchDiscordMessages/searchPastCommits never throw — vector path failure (embed throw, findNearest 9 FAILED_PRECONDITION, 0 hits) degrades to keyword fallback + logger.warn; outermost try/catch → []. backfillEmbeddings: HttpsError failed-precondition (no auth) / invalid-argument (missing repoId, bad collection) only; per-doc embed failure counted in stats.failed, never aborts the batch.

v2-only; REGION asia-east1; onCall auth check + arg validation at top; secrets:[openaiKey]; index.ts re-exports only (added one backfillEmbeddings export). No new npm deps. MODELS/embedding via tools/embedding (no inline model names).

Rule C/D for onDiscordMessageCreated: markIdempotent guard stays first; embedding (heavy work) runs AFTER the guard, best-effort try/catch leaving null on failure — copied from onCommitCreated's embedding path.
Structured logger.warn for every degraded path (vector unavailable, embed failed) and logger.info for backfill pass completion; no console.log.

§R1 AI never commits/pushes (orchestrator-authorized commit on branch only, no push); §R2 no deploy / no index create; §R3 no new deps; §3.3 match surrounding style + comment density; only implement requested W2a–W2d, no linkedTaskIds (Q5 OUT of scope).
